holdings.infoBox: CWEB is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF stock at 56.27%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 36.50%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 29.88%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 18.33%, and Cash at 0.00%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily CSI China Internet Index Bull 2X ETF (CWEB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CSI Overseas China Internet index. The fund provides 2x leveraged daily exposure to an index composed of overseas-listed Chinese internet companies. CWEB was launched on Nov 2, 2016 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Growth, tech and China: These ETFs have started July strong
data.text: Tom Lydon, CEO of ETF Trends and ETF Database, and David Mazza, head of product at Direxion, break down the exchange-traded fund products that are attracting investors in July with CNBC's Bob Pisani.
